title: Sugar Turns the Plan Against Them: Aftermath
description: Pages 21–22 focus on sugar turns the plan against them: aftermath, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as trebol and Sugar overwhelm the Tontatta and push Usopp into a terrifying decision point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There were just a whole bunch of bees inside our cargo....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Not a problem with our trans- actions, if that's what you're thinking...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, just who are you!? Heyy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Could it really be the Strawhat crew!?

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: How'd they get this far!!? Why're they after sugar!??

summary: Sugar Turns the Plan Against Them: Aftermath focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as trebol and Sugar overwhelm the Tontatta and push Usopp into a terrifying decision point.
